prediction.reasoning: Based on typical short-term equity price movements, I applied a conservative random walk model with daily volatility around 1-2%. The point estimate assumes minimal drift over 3 days. Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty with higher confidence levels, using approximate normal distribution of returns with standard deviation scaling by square root of time (3 days).
